tests.description: Direct deps: requests (semver), pdfminer.six (calver), Pillow (two-segment), httpx (semver)
All 4 direct deps must resolve regardless of version format — versionPatternWhl stress test
sha1 must be populated for ALL packages — any partial regex fix would show as empty sha1 for one format
4 direct + transitives: anyio, certifi, chardet, cryptography, httpcore, idna, urllib3
